page.title: Write down this moment first
page.description: The expression does not need to be complete. Honest is better than polished. This is the most natural place to start.

draft.title: Writing Start
draft.description: Keep a concrete example nearby. Saved reflections live in the record list on the right.

recent.title: Recent Reflections
recent.description: Review what you have written recently, then decide how to organize it later.

themes.title: Theme Threads
themes.description: View tags and months together to see which topics keep returning.

writingPrompts.title: Review Questions
writingPrompts.description: You do not need complete answers before writing; use questions to return attention to yourself.

placeholders.title: For example: what I really want to keep today
placeholders.excerpt: What happened today? What did I notice? What should future review remember?
placeholders.tags: Separate with commas, for example: rhythm, work

empty.records: No reflections match the current filter.
empty.tags: No tags under the current filter.
empty.months: No month distribution under the current filter.

edit.description: Keep the time, title, short body, and a few tags.

validation.required: Enter the time, title, and reflection

prompts.keep: What judgment from this moment do I want to keep long term?
prompts.pattern: Has this appeared in recent reflections more than once?
prompts.next: If I only make one small adjustment, what comes next?
